title: A letter from a civilian to the Min. of Aeronautics reporting a UFO sighting in Ceres-GO [1979]

text_preview:
Correspondence from a civilian sent to the Ministry of Aeronautics reporting UFO sighting and contact. Translation below:

“On the night of February 26, 1979, Monday, around 23:45/00:00, I was on the balcony of Mr. D.L.’s residence […], in Ceres (GO ), I looked towards the direction I suppose north or northeast, about 45 degrees from the horizon, and I noticed a blue-green light that moved towards the top, at a speed comparable to that of a modern aircraft. The object stopped, and returned the same way, back to the north-northeast, without turning. Then, it made very rapid evolutions, like a l
summary: Civilian letter to the Ministry of Aeronautics described a blue-green light over Ceres-GO on Feb 26, 1979, which appeared to respond to the witness's hand gestures in the vertical axis.
